fixes_applied.description: Replaced inline expect() assertion for complimentary pages value with print_history_page.verify_complimentary_pages_value() method call. The test script now uses the provided verification component from page additions, improving code reusability and maintainability.

Replaced inline expect() assertion for additional pages value with print_history_page.verify_additional_pages_value() method call. The color verification remains as-is since there is no specific helper method for color checking. Using the provided verification component improves code consistency.

Restructured the page additions file to use the Elements inner class pattern required by the AURA framework. Converted all direct Locator property definitions (self.X = page.locator(...)) to Elements class attributes storing selector strings (X = 'selector'). This critical fix ensures the page object follows the framework's POM architecture and will integrate consistently with all other page objects in the codebase.

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. Expected outcome: score 100/100 with zero violations.
